summary: Frontend testing completed for GreenLink new features: 1) Login page activation buttons, 2) Member activation page, 3) Agent activation page, 4) Field Agents management page, 5) Add Parcel page with member/department selection. All 4 requested features are implemented and functional.

minor.issue: Returns 403 Forbidden when cookie session expires - user needs to re-login

issues: Error toast 'Erreur lors du chargement des agents' appears briefly when session is stale - disappears on re-login

critical_code_review_comments: All data-testid attributes are properly implemented for testing
Member activation page (/activate-member) has proper 2-step flow: phone verification -> password creation
Agent activation page (/activate-agent) has cyan color scheme with permissions list
Field Agents page shows existing agent Konan Marc with status badge 'Activé'
Add Parcel form includes 'Département' dropdown with 80+ Côte d'Ivoire departments
Add Parcel form has 'Agriculteur / Membre' dropdown for member selection
Good UX with info boxes explaining next steps for activation flows
context_for_next_testing_agent: 4 new features tested and working: 1) Login page has 2 activation buttons (Member Coopérative and Agent Terrain), 2) /activate-member page for member account activation via phone, 3) /activate-agent page for field agent activation via phone, 4) /cooperative/agents page shows existing agent Konan Marc with 'Nouvel Agent' modal, 5) /cooperative/parcels/new has member selection dropdown and department dropdown with 80+ Côte d'Ivoire departments. Cooperative login works with coop-test@greenlink.ci / coop123.

features_verified.Login Page Activation Buttons: PASS - Both 'Activer mon compte Membre Coopérative' and 'Activer mon compte Agent Terrain' buttons visible and navigate correctly
features_verified./activate-member Page: PASS - Phone input with +225 prefix, verify button, 2-step flow working
features_verified./activate-agent Page: PASS - Cyan theme, phone input, verify button, permissions list shown in step 2
features_verified./cooperative/agents Page: PASS - Shows 1 agent (Konan Marc), Nouvel Agent button opens modal with all form fields
features_verified./cooperative/parcels/new Page: PASS - Member selection dropdown, Department dropdown with Abidjan, Daloa, Gagnoa, etc.
features_verified.Department Dropdown: PASS - Shows alphabetically sorted list of 80+ Côte d'Ivoire departments
features_verified.Add Agent Modal: PASS - All fields visible: Nom complet, Téléphone, Email, Zone d'intervention, Villages couverts
